not_a_catch: false-alarm profile of the instrument; not evidence the organ works (§0/§7)
population_rule: every .substrate/threads/<thread>/<ts>__<author>.md (READMEs excluded; no no-op files on disk)
warm_authors_caveat: corpus authors were generally in-thread (warm), so a fire is ~a false positive: this is the cry-wolf rate directly / an upper bound on usable signal

cold.note: bridge glossary absent — invariant across any cold route

warm_control.note: ancestor routed — must be ~0 (relation is not always-on)

name_match_only.note: cold fires with >=1 compound-name match (the rate if bare-root match were dropped)
